metadata.description: Portable Agent Skills that find and fix real bugs in a Java (Maven/Gradle) file: detect the JDK the project needs, read one source file, prove each suspected bug with a test that FAILS on the current code, then fix the ROOT CAUSE so the test passes (never a workaround), and score the fix+test against a pure-LLM mergeability rubric (line-weighted, no runtime required) so the change is clean enough to upstream.

plugins.name: fix-java-bugs
plugins.description: Detect the project Java version, then find and fix real bugs one file at a time — each proven by a failing regression test and fixed at the root cause, passing a pure-LLM mergeability rubric (standard tools only, no runtime dependency).
